assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: impact-map.md lists concrete changes with specific details: 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary model struct with fields: critical, high, medium, low, total' (line 6), 'Add advisory_summary service method to SbomService that queries sbom_advisory join table, groups by severity, and returns aggregated counts with deduplication by advisory ID' (line 7), 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint handler with 5-minute cache-control header' (line 8). New Files and Modified Files sections list exact paths with specific descriptions of what each file contains or what modification is needed.
